title: tephrosia gardneri
intro: Tephrosia gardneri, also known as the slender pea flower or garden pea-flower, is a leguminous plant native to India and other parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Tephrosia gardneri has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, and is also believed to have anti-diabetic and anti-cancer properties. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its health benefits.
